title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A tutorial video from AWS Developers explaining Identity and Access Management (IAM) fundamentals, including users, roles, policies, least privilege principles, and the IAM Access Analyzer tool. The video addresses common beginner mistakes like overly permissive access and demonstrates best practices such as avoiding access keys in code.
